description.content: Returns all available services with their endpoints and metadata.
Create a new API key with 200 free credits. Optionally pass email for updates and ref for referral tracking.
Check remaining credits for an API key.
Verify a USDC payment on Base and add credits to an API key.
Verify a Monero payment and add credits to an API key.
Get USDC and XMR payment addresses and pricing.
Get aggregate gateway analytics — request volume, top services, response times.
Email sending API for AI agents. Send plain text, HTML, or templated emails with SMTP configuration and delivery tracking.
Token analytics via DexScreener + GeckoTerminal. Price, volume, liquidity, holders across 8 chains.
URL-to-image API. Headless Chromium, 5 viewports, full-page, dark mode, element targeting.
URL-to-image API. Headless Chromium, 5 viewports, full-page, dark mode, element targeting.
Web content extraction. URL to markdown, text, HTML, or structured data. JavaScript rendering via Chromium.
Web content extraction. URL to markdown, text, HTML, or structured data. JavaScript rendering via Chromium.
Convert data between JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, TSV, and Markdown tables. Plus base64, URL encoding, hashing, and formatting.
IP geolocation, timezone, country, city lookup. Self-hosted MaxMind database, sub-microsecond lookups, batch and distance calculation.
Web search for AI agents. DuckDuckGo-powered, structured JSON results. Single, multi-query, and extract modes.
Web search for AI agents. DuckDuckGo-powered, structured JSON results. Single, multi-query, and extract modes.
Non-custodial multi-chain wallet API. Create wallets, check balances, send transactions across 7 chains.
REST API wrapper around Hyperliquid DEX. 229 perpetual futures markets. Market orders, limit orders, positions.
Model Context Protocol server for DeFi operations. 12 tools for token research, prices, and analytics.

Multi-chain non-custodial HD wallet API for AI agents. 9 chains (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche, Solana, Bitcoin). Create wallets, check balances, send transactions, cross-chain swaps. 0.3% swap fee, 10 free transactions.
Cryptographically provable fair games API. HMAC-SHA256 proofs on every outcome. Dice, coinflip, roulette, cards, lottery.
Service registry for AI agents. Register, discover, search, rate, and monitor agent services.
Disposable identities for AI agents. Ed25519 signing, DIDs, attestations, challenge-response auth.
Referral tracking for agent-to-agent commissions. Programs, affiliates, click/conversion tracking, leaderboards.
Persistent key-value storage + vector search for AI agents. 128d embeddings, conversations, namespaces.
Distributed job queue for AI agents. Workers, priorities, workflows, DLQ, webhook callbacks.
Encrypted secret storage. AES-256-GCM encryption, vault namespaces, versioning, audit logs.
Job scheduling for AI agents. Cron expressions, intervals, one-time jobs, webhook callbacks.
Receive, store, and forward webhooks. HMAC verification, retry logic, event filtering.
Pub-sub messaging for AI agents. Channels, WebSocket subscriptions, event replay, webhooks.
Temporary file storage for AI agents. Upload, download, share files with TTL expiration and direct links.
Centralized log ingestion and querying. Structured JSON logs, batch ingest, real-time tailing via WebSocket.
Centralized log ingestion and querying. Structured JSON logs, batch ingest, real-time tailing via WebSocket.
Uptime monitoring and health checking. Automated checks at 30s-1h intervals, response time tracking, webhook alerts, incident history, status page.
Address poisoning detection for EVM wallets. Detects dust transactions, similarity attacks, and risk scoring.
Compile and deploy Solidity contracts. 9 chains, 5 templates (ERC-20, ERC-721, etc.). Built-in solc 0.8.x.
Deploy ERC-20 tokens. 5 templates, 7 chains. Built-in solc compilation and on-chain deployment.
Sandboxed code execution for AI agents. Run JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, and Bash safely with resource limits and sessions.
Generate PDFs from HTML, Markdown, URLs, and templates. Pixel-perfect rendering with Playwright/Chromium.
Resize, convert, crop, rotate, blur, sharpen, optimize images. Generate QR codes and placeholders. Transform pipelines. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, TIFF.
URL shortener with click analytics, custom slugs, expiring links, tags, and bulk operations.
DNS resolution, WHOIS/RDAP data, domain availability checking, and DNS propagation analysis across 8 public resolvers.
Code and text sharing with auto-language detection, collections, diffing, expiring pastes, and raw content endpoints.
Multi-provider LLM proxy. Unified API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, Together, DeepSeek. Response caching, retries, BYO keys.
Instant webhook capture and inspection. Create a unique inbox URL, send webhooks to it, inspect every request in real-time. RequestBin alternative.
Domain registration and DNS management for AI agents. 18 TLDs supported, privacy-first registration, full DNS control (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, CAA). 15% markup.

Unified API gateway providing 40+ services for AI agents. Web scraping, screenshots, code execution, crypto data, agent memory, file storage, and more.

**Authentication**: Free tier (200 credits, no key needed). For higher volume: create an API key via `POST /api/keys/create`, then pass it as `X-API-Key` header or `?key=` query param.

**x402 Payments**: All endpoints support [x402](https://www.x402.org/) micropayments (USDC on Base). Send a request without auth to get a 402 response with payment details.

Contact Support:
 Name: Clawdia
